faqs.question: How much does bed bug treatment cost in Springfield Gardens?
faqs.answer: Bed bug treatment in Springfield Gardens typically ranges from $1,200 to $3,500, depending on the size of your home, severity of the infestation, and treatment method required. We provide free inspections and detailed quotes before beginning any work.

faqs.question: How long does bed bug treatment take in Springfield Gardens homes?
faqs.answer: Most bed bug treatments take 4-6 hours for an average Springfield Gardens home. Heat treatments are completed in one day, while chemical treatments may require follow-up visits 10-14 days later to eliminate newly hatched eggs and ensure complete eradication.

faqs.question: Are bed bug treatments safe for my Springfield Gardens family and pets?
faqs.answer: Yes, our bed bug treatments are completely safe when applied by our certified technicians. We use EPA-approved products and follow strict safety protocols. For heat treatments, no chemicals are needed. We provide clear instructions for preparation and re-entry to ensure your family's safety.

faqs.question: Do you guarantee bed bug elimination in Springfield Gardens?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We stand behind our work with a comprehensive warranty. If bed bugs return within the guarantee period after following our preparation and prevention guidelines, we will re-treat your Springfield Gardens home at no additional charge.
